message:
test(tui): add search/navigation perf benchmarks + fix clippy lints (br-3vwi.9.1)

Add 2 perf benchmarks: search interaction cycle (/ → type → Enter → render)
and key navigation (Down + Up + render). Fix 9 clippy manual_contains warnings
in inspector.rs macro action tests. All 11 perf baselines within budget.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
